headerTitle: Prompt Systems Engineer  ·  LLM Pipeline Design  ·  Agentic AI  ·  Production AI Engineering
intro: Noodle is building the AI layer for higher education — systems that understand student and institutional context and surface the right information at the right time. The Prompt Systems Engineer owns the architecture that makes that reliable at scale.
bullets: Prompt engineering and structured output design — 14 live AI endpoints where the prompt is the system. Explicit persona framing, output schema contracts, chain-of-thought scaffolding, fallback specifications. Multi-model routing (Haiku for classification, Sonnet for generation) and Zod-validated JSON output on every endpoint.

LLM evaluation pipelines — input-output pair generation, edge case cataloguing, regression test sets, cross-model consistency checks (Claude vs GPT-4o). Catch prompt drift on model updates and flag output failures before they reach users.

Agentic pipeline architecture and context engineering — multi-step agentic workflows, tool use, MCP protocol, memory strategies, escalation paths. Built AI systems against live operational data with inconsistent schemas and real-world edge cases across six deployments.
matchNotes: Strong alignment on prompt engineering (14 live endpoints), LLM evals, agentic systems, and TypeScript/Python stack. Education domain is new but AI engineering pattern transfers directly. $115-130K is below pipeline ceiling but role quality and direct match is high. Remote.
